# Pagesmith - Full LLM Reference

Pagesmith is a filesystem-first content toolkit organized as a multi-package workspace under the `@pagesmith/` npm scope.

## Agent Onboarding (Read In This Order)

1. Run `npx pagesmith-docs init --ai` for docs projects, or `npx pagesmith-core ai --profile default` for core/site projects, to scaffold assistant context and markdown guidelines.
2. For docs workflows, read `node_modules/@pagesmith/docs/ai-guidelines/usage.md`.
3. For core/custom-site workflows, read `node_modules/@pagesmith/core/ai-guidelines/usage.md`.
4. Use `node_modules/@pagesmith/docs/ai-guidelines/llms.txt` or `node_modules/@pagesmith/core/ai-guidelines/llms.txt` for quick context, and load `llms-full.txt` only when deeper reference is needed.
5. If MCP is enabled, use `pagesmith-docs mcp --stdio` for docs projects and `@pagesmith/core/mcp` for collection-aware inspection and validation in custom core/site integrations.
6. For upgrades across pre-1.0 versions, review `MIGRATING.md` before proposing refactors.

## Packages

- `@pagesmith/core`: headless content layer with collections, loaders, markdown pipeline, validation, assets helpers, `z` re-export, and the `pagesmithContent` Vite plugin
- `@pagesmith/site`: site-building package with the `pagesmith-site` CLI, preset loading, JSX runtime, CSS/runtime bundles, SSG helpers, and shared assets helpers
- `@pagesmith/docs`: convention-based documentation built on `@pagesmith/core` + `@pagesmith/site`, with nav/sidebar generation from `docs/` when it exists (otherwise `content/`), bundled Pagefind search, a default theme, listing pages, and layout/shell override slots

## Core APIs

### Configuration
- `defineCollection(def)` — type-safe collection definition with Zod schema inference
- `defineCollections(map)` — define multiple collections with strong literal inference
- `defineConfig(config)` — type-safe `ContentLayerConfig`

### Content Layer
- `createContentLayer(config)` — returns a `ContentLayer` backed by `ContentStore`
- `layer.getCollection(name)` — load all entries in a collection (cached)
- `layer.getEntry(collection, slug)` — get a single entry by slug
- `layer.convert(markdown, options?)` — convert raw markdown outside collections
- `layer.validate(collection?)` — run all validators
- `layer.invalidate(collection, slug)` / `invalidateCollection(name)` / `invalidateAll()` — cache busting

### Content Entry
- `entry.slug` / `entry.collection` / `entry.filePath` / `entry.data` / `entry.rawContent`
- `entry.render(options?)` → `{ html, headings, readTime }` — lazy, cached
- `entry.clearRenderCache()` — force re-render

### Vite Plugins
- `pagesmithContent(collections, options?)` from `@pagesmith/site/vite` for site consumers (canonical implementation also available from `@pagesmith/core/vite`) — virtual module plugin for framework integration
  - Options: `collections`, `moduleId` (default: `virtual:content`), `configPath`, `dts`, `root`, `contentRoot`
  - Auto-generates TypeScript declarations
  - Hot reload on content/config changes
- `pagesmithSsg(options?)` from `@pagesmith/site/vite` — SSG plugin with dev server, Pagefind, and asset handling
  - Options: `entry`, `pagefind` (default: true), `contentDirs`
  - SSR entry exports: `getRoutes(config) → string[] | Promise<string[]>`, `render(url, config) → string | Promise<string>`
  - Config provided: `SsgRenderConfig` with `base`, `root`, `cssPath`, `jsPath`, `searchEnabled`, `isDev`
- `sharedAssetsPlugin()` from `@pagesmith/site/vite` — serves bundled fonts (Open Sans, JetBrains Mono)

### Markdown Pipeline
- `processMarkdown(raw, config?, preExtracted?)` → `{ html, headings, frontmatter }`
- Pipeline: remark-parse → remark-gfm → remark-frontmatter → remark-github-alerts → remark-smartypants → remark-math (when `markdown.math` is enabled or auto-detected) → (user remark plugins) → lang-alias transform → remark-rehype → rehype-mathjax (when math is enabled) → applyPagesmithCodeRenderer → rehype-code-tabs → rehype-scrollable-tables → rehype-slug → rehype-autolink-headings → rehype-external-links → rehype-accessible-emojis → rehype-local-images → heading extraction → (user rehype plugins) → rehype-stringify
- Processor cached per MarkdownConfig reference via WeakMap

### Markdown Features
- **GitHub Flavored Markdown** (remark-gfm): tables, strikethrough, task lists, autolinks
- **GitHub Alerts** (remark-github-alerts): `> [!NOTE]`, `> [!TIP]`, `> [!IMPORTANT]`, `> [!WARNING]`, `> [!CAUTION]`
- **Math** (remark-math + rehype-mathjax): inline `$...$` and block `$$...$$` rendered to SVG
- **Smart Typography** (remark-smartypants): "curly quotes", em—dashes, el…lipses
- **External Links** (rehype-external-links): auto `target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"` on absolute URLs
- **Accessible Emojis** (rehype-accessible-emojis): wrapped in `<span role="img" aria-label="...">`
- **Heading Links** (rehype-slug + rehype-autolink-headings): auto `id` attributes and anchor links

### Built-in Code Renderer Features
Syntax highlighting via the built-in Pagesmith renderer on top of Shiki with dual themes (default: github-light/github-dark):
- **Dual themes**: light/dark themes are mapped to Pagesmith's color-scheme classes. Configure: `shiki.themes.light`, `shiki.themes.dark`
- **Line numbers**: code block meta `showLineNumbers` or config `shiki.defaultShowLineNumbers`
- **File titles**: code block meta `title="filename.js"`
- **Line highlighting**: `mark={3}` (highlight), `ins={4}` (insertion/green), `del={5}` (deletion/red)
- **Collapsible sections**: `collapse={1-5,12-14}` — lines collapsed by default, expandable
- **Copy button**: automatic on all code blocks
- **Language badges**: automatic language indicator
- **Text wrapping**: handled automatically
- **Frame styles**: multiple code frame options
- **Shared chrome + inline tokens**: shared code block layout ships in Pagesmith CSS bundles; Shiki token colors and copy/collapse runtime are injected into the rendered HTML
- **Custom CSS variables**: respects `--ps-font-*`, `--ps-color-*`, `--ps-radius-*` tokens
- **Combined meta example**: `` ```ts title="server.ts" showLineNumbers mark={3} ins={7-8} collapse={1-2} ``

### Schemas
- `BaseFrontmatterSchema` — title, description, publishedDate, lastUpdatedOn, tags, draft
- `BlogFrontmatterSchema` — extends base with category, featured, coverImage
- `ProjectFrontmatterSchema` — extends base with gitRepo, links
- `HeadingSchema` — depth, text, slug
- `MarkdownConfigSchema` — remarkPlugins, rehypePlugins, allowDangerousHtml, math, shiki (themes, langAlias, defaultShowLineNumbers)
- `z` re-exported from Zod for convenience

### Validation
- `builtinMarkdownValidators` — linkValidator, headingValidator, codeBlockValidator
- `runValidators(ctx, validators)` — execute validators against content
- Custom validators: implement `ContentValidator { name, validate(ctx) }` with access to `ValidatorContext.mdast`
- Disable built-ins: `disableBuiltinValidators: true` on collection definition

### Loaders
- `MarkdownLoader` (.md) — gray-matter frontmatter + body
- `JsonLoader` (.json, .json5) — JSON.parse for `.json`, JSON5.parse for `.json5`
- `JsoncLoader` (.jsonc) — comment-stripped JSON parsed with `JSON.parse`
- `YamlLoader` (.yml, .yaml) — yaml package
- `TomlLoader` (.toml) — smol-toml
- Custom: implement `Loader { name, kind, extensions, load(filePath) }`

### Collection Options
- `loader` — loader type string or custom Loader instance
- `directory` — content file directory
- `schema` — Zod validation schema
- `include` / `exclude` — glob patterns
- `computed` — computed fields derived from entry data
- `validate` — custom validation hook
- `filter` — entry filter
- `slugify` — custom slug generation
- `transform` — pre-validation transform
- `validators` — custom content validators
- `disableBuiltinValidators` — disable link, heading, code-block validators

### Site JSX And CSS
- JSX runtime lives in `@pagesmith/site/jsx-runtime`
- Configure: `"jsxImportSource": "@pagesmith/site"` in tsconfig.json when using the built-in JSX runtime
- `buildCss(entryPath, { minify? })` lives in `@pagesmith/site/css`
- Server-side only — no browser runtime

### Related Site Package
- Choose `@pagesmith/site` instead of layering both packages into the same app-facing contract when you need JSX, CSS/runtime bundles, the `pagesmith-site` CLI, or Vite SSG helpers
- `@pagesmith/site/runtime` — `getRuntimeCSS()` / `getRuntimeJS()` for the standalone tier
- `@pagesmith/site/runtime` — `getContentCSS()` / `getContentJS()` for the content tier
- `@pagesmith/site/runtime` — `getViewportCSS()` / `getViewportCSSPath()` and other path helpers

### CSS Export Paths
- `@pagesmith/site/css/content` — prose + inline code styles
- `@pagesmith/site/css/standalone` — full layout + prose + TOC
- `@pagesmith/site/css/viewport` — responsive viewport base
- `@pagesmith/site/css/fonts` — bundled Open Sans + JetBrains Mono fonts

### AI Assistant Artifacts
- `installAiArtifacts(options)` — generate assistant files
- `getAiArtifacts(options)` / `getAiArtifactContent(assistant, kind, options)`
- Supports: Claude, Codex, Gemini
- Generates: CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, GEMINI.md, skills, llms.txt, llms-full.txt
- Options: `assistants`, `scope` (project/user), `profile` (default/docs), `includeLlms`, `force`, `skillName`

## Docs Package

### Programmatic API
- `build(options?)` — build static docs site
- `startDev(options?)` — development server with hot reload
- `preview(options?)` — preview built site
- `defineDocsConfig(config)` — type-safe docs config
- `loadDocsConfig(path?)` — load config from file
- `resolveDocsConfig(configPath?, overrides?)` — resolve effective docs config with defaults and CLI/env overrides

### CLI
- `pagesmith-docs dev [--port] [--open] [--config] [--out-dir] [--base-path]`
- `pagesmith-docs build [--out-dir] [--base-path] [--config]`
- `pagesmith-docs preview [--port] [--config]`

### Docs Config (pagesmith.config.json5)
- Site: `name`, `title`, `description`, `origin`, `language`
- Paths: `contentDir`, `outDir`, `publicDir`, `basePath`, `homeLink`
- Navigation: `footerLinks` (array of `{ label, path }`)
- Sidebar: `sidebar.collapsible` (boolean, default true)
- Search: `search.enabled` (default true), `search.showImages`, `search.showSubResults`, `search.pagefindFlags`
- Theme: `theme.lightColor`, `theme.darkColor`, `theme.layouts` (override map)
- Analytics: `analytics.googleAnalytics`
- Markdown: `markdown` (MarkdownConfig from core)
- Multi-package: `packages` (maps slug to `{ label }`)

### Content Structure
- `<contentDir>/README.md` → home page (commonly `docs/README.md` in zero-config repos, otherwise `content/README.md`)
- Top-level folders → nav sections + sidebar groups
- Subfolders with `README.md` → pages
- `meta.json5` → section ordering, series, display names

### Frontmatter (all pages)
- `title` — page title
- `description` — meta description
- `navLabel` — override top nav label
- `sidebarLabel` — override sidebar label
- `order` — manual sort order
- `draft` — exclude from build
- All fields optional, additional fields passed through

### Home Page Frontmatter
- `hero` — hero section (name, text, tagline, badge, actions)
- `install` — installation command snippet
- `features` — feature cards (icon, title, details)
- `packages` — package cards (name, description, href, tag, version)
- `codeExample` — code example (label, title, code)
- `actions` — CTA buttons (text, link, theme)

### Section Meta (meta.json5)
- `displayName` — sidebar/nav label
- `description` — section description
- `layout` / `itemLayout` — layout assignments
- `orderBy` — `'manual'` | `'publishedDate'`
- `items` — manual page order (slug array)
- `series` — series grouping (slug, displayName, shortName, description, articles)
- `collapsed` — start sidebar section collapsed
- `noListing` — hide from listings
- `firstItem` — default first item

### Layout Overrides
- Configure via `theme.layouts` in config: `{ home, page, listing, notFound }`
- Docs layout overrides use `@pagesmith/docs/jsx-runtime`; custom site chrome uses `@pagesmith/site/jsx-runtime`
- Props: `content`, `frontmatter`, `headings`, `slug`, `site`
- Page layout gets: `sidebarSections`, `prev`, `next`
- Listing layout gets: `listingCards`, `listingGroups`, `listingTotal`
- Export: `default` or named export matching layout name (DocPage, DocHome, DocListing, DocNotFound)

### Navigation
- Top nav: auto-generated from top-level folders, override via `headerLinks` in root meta.json5
- Sidebar: auto-generated from folder structure, ordered by meta.json5 items array
- Prev/next: auto-generated from flattened sidebar order
- Footer: configured via `footerLinks` in config

### Search
- Pagefind full-text search, bundled and indexed at build time
- Keyboard shortcut: Cmd+K / Ctrl+K
- Search modal with lazy-loaded Pagefind UI
- Configure: `search.enabled`, `search.showImages`, `search.showSubResults`, `search.pagefindFlags`

### Docs Schemas (from @pagesmith/docs/schemas)
- JSON schema files shipped under `node_modules/@pagesmith/docs/schemas/`: `pagesmith-config.schema.json`, `docs-root-meta.schema.json`, `docs-section-meta.schema.json`, `docs-page-frontmatter.schema.json`, `docs-home-frontmatter.schema.json`
- Zod/TS schemas exported from `@pagesmith/docs/schemas` include `DocsConfigSchema`, `DocsRootMetaSchema`, `DocsSectionMetaSchema`, `DocsPageFrontmatterSchema`, `DocsHomeFrontmatterSchema`, `DocsSearchConfigSchema`, `DocsThemeConfigSchema`, and `HeadingSchema`

## Export Map

| Import path | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `@pagesmith/core` | Main content-layer API barrel |
| `@pagesmith/core/markdown` | processMarkdown |
| `@pagesmith/core/schemas` | Zod schemas and types |
| `@pagesmith/core/loaders` | Loader classes and registry |
| `@pagesmith/core/assets` | Asset copying and hashing |
| `@pagesmith/core/ai` | AI assistant file installer |
| `@pagesmith/core/vite` | Core-owned Vite content plugin barrel (`pagesmithContent`) |
| `@pagesmith/core/create` | Project scaffolding |
| `@pagesmith/core/mcp` | Programmatic MCP server entry |
| `@pagesmith/core/llms` | Compact AI context index |
| `@pagesmith/core/llms-full` | Full AI context |
| `@pagesmith/core/ai-guidelines/*` | Version-matched core AI guidance files |
| `@pagesmith/core/agents/*` | Stable agent-friendly aliases for core prompts/files |
| `@pagesmith/site` | Site package plus re-exported content-layer APIs for site consumers |
| `@pagesmith/site/jsx-runtime` | h, Fragment, HtmlString |
| `@pagesmith/site/jsx-dev-runtime` | JSX dev runtime |
| `@pagesmith/site/css` | buildCss (LightningCSS) |
| `@pagesmith/site/css/content` | Content CSS file |
| `@pagesmith/site/css/standalone` | Standalone CSS file |
| `@pagesmith/site/css/viewport` | Viewport CSS file |
| `@pagesmith/site/css/fonts` | Bundled font faces |
| `@pagesmith/site/runtime` | Pre-built CSS/JS accessors |
| `@pagesmith/site/vite` | App-facing Vite barrel (`pagesmithContent`, SSG, shared assets) |
| `@pagesmith/site/ssg-utils` | Shared SSG helpers |
| `@pagesmith/docs` | Main API (`build`, `startDev`, `preview`, `defineDocsConfig`, `validateConfig`, `resolveDocsConfig`, `loadDocsConfig`, `reportConfigIssues`, `withBase`, `docsPreset`, `Html`, `buildSiteModel`, `getPrevNext`, `getSitePayload`) |
| `@pagesmith/docs/components` | Reusable docs UI components |
| `@pagesmith/docs/layouts` | Stock docs layouts for composition/override work |
| `@pagesmith/docs/jsx-runtime` | JSX runtime for docs layout overrides |
| `@pagesmith/docs/jsx-dev-runtime` | JSX dev runtime for docs overrides |
| `@pagesmith/docs/schemas` | Config, layout props, page data schemas |
| `@pagesmith/docs/preset` | Docs preset |
| `@pagesmith/docs/theme` | Theme shell exports such as `Html` |
| `@pagesmith/docs/mcp` | Programmatic docs MCP entry |
| `@pagesmith/docs/llms` | Compact docs AI context index |
| `@pagesmith/docs/llms-full` | Full docs AI context |
| `@pagesmith/docs/ai-guidelines/*` | Version-matched docs AI guidance files |
| `@pagesmith/docs/agents/*` | Stable agent-friendly aliases for docs prompts/files |
